text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, as I watch the other racers<n>train...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Eek! I-I'm so sorry! I'm in the way,<n>aren't I?
That's right. I'm just a<n>waste of space taking up
someone<n>else's place!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I calm Meisho Doto down and explain<n>that
wasn't what I meant.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
When I ask why she's staring at the<n>track, she
tells me she wanted to<n>watch T.M. Opera O run.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I was hoping to follow her example,<n>but I don't
think I'm anywhere near<n>good enough to copy
her...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
She runs with so much power and<n>confidence...
She has everything I<n>don't...
choice_data_list:
You should try copying her unwavering
confidence.
You should try copying her boundless energy.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Confidence... That's the thing I lack<n>the most.
choice_data_list: They say you should fake it till you make it.
They say you should fake it till you make it.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Fake it till I make it... Do you think it'll<n>work if I
make up a nickname for<n>myself like Opera has?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
If she's the "Centurial Overlord,"<n>maybe I can be
the "Centurial<n>Tempest" or something.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Indeed, that is a positively<n>superb-sounding
name!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh? O-Opera O?! Did... did you hear<n>all that?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
P-please ignore me! There's no way I<n>could live
up to such an impressive<n>name!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto flees from us with the<n>force of a
raging storm. In her haste,<n>she passes an entire
pack of training<n>Umamusume in an instant.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Her name truly speaks for itself!<n>Haaah ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: ...Right. She is always radiating<n>energy.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But... There's no way I can be like<n>that... It's just
too hard...
choice_data_list: Let's get her to demonstrate for you, then!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I might be able to do it if I had a<n>
demonstration... Um... I'll try asking<n>her for one,
then.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: H-haaah... Ha ha—hack! Cough!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: And now, strike a refined pose!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... A refined... pose...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ta-daaa—eek?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Goodness. What an exceptionallyunique pose! It seems I have things tolearn from you!
